scripts.guard:no-service-role-in-client: grep -RIn --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.next --exclude-dir=.git "SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" app components middleware.ts | grep -v "app/api\|app/.*/route.ts\|lib/supabaseAdmin.ts\|lib/adminAuth.ts" && echo "service role key used outside server" && exit 1 || exit 0
scripts.guard:no-backup-in-client: rg -n "\.from\((\"|').*_backup(\"|')\)|checklists_backup|_backup" app --glob '!app/api/**' && echo "backup table access found in client code" && exit 1 || exit 0
